# restoreLab — Mobile Detailing & Restoration

> Premium mobile car detailing service in Barcelona metropolitan area
> (Sant Cugat, Pedralbes, Terrassa, etc.). Specialties: paint correction,
> ceramic coating, glass polishing, headlight restoration, acrylic restoration.
> Primary language: Spanish (/es/). Also available in English (/en/) and Catalan (/ca/).

## Services

- [Corrección de Pintura Auto (Car Paint Correction)](https://restorelab.io/es/services/car-paint-correction): Multi-stage machine polishing for swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation removal. [EN](https://restorelab.io/en/services/car-paint-correction)
- [Pulido de Cristales y Eliminación de Arañazos (Glass Polishing)](https://restorelab.io/es/services/glass-polishing): Windshield scratch removal, water stain removal, and clarity restoration. [EN](https://restorelab.io/en/services/glass-polishing)
- [Acrílico y Policarbonato (Acrylic Restoration)](https://restorelab.io/es/services/acrylic-restoration): UV-damaged plexiglass restoration for motorcycle visors, boat windows, and acrylic surfaces. [EN](https://restorelab.io/en/services/acrylic-restoration)
- [Pulido y Restauración de Faros (Headlight Restoration)](https://restorelab.io/es/services/headlight-restoration): UV-yellowed lens restoration with sealant for clarity and durability. [EN](https://restorelab.io/en/services/headlight-restoration)
- [Limpieza de Cuero Interior (Interior Leather Restoration)](https://restorelab.io/es/services/interior-leather): Leather seat conditioning, color repair, and sun damage restoration. [EN](https://restorelab.io/en/services/interior-leather)
- [Pack Pre-Venta (Pre-Sale Detailing Pack)](https://restorelab.io/es/services/pre-sale-pack): Comprehensive detailing to maximize used-car listing photos and sale price. [EN](https://restorelab.io/en/services/pre-sale-pack)

## Service areas

- [Sant Cugat del Vallès](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/sant-cugat)
- [Barcelona](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/barcelona)
- [Terrassa](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/terrassa)
- [Matadepera](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/matadepera)
- [Sant Just Desvern](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/sant-just-desvern)
- [Sant Quirze del Vallès](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/sant-quirze-del-valles)
- [Bellaterra](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/bellaterra)
- [Pedralbes](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/pedralbes)
- [Sant Gervasi – Tres Torres](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/sant-gervasi)
- [Castelldefels](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/castelldefels)
- [Alella · Tiana · Teià](https://restorelab.io/es/areas/alella-tiana-teia)

## Pricing

- Express Refresh: €149
- Single-Stage Correction: €289
- Two-Stage Correction: €549
- Ceramic Coating 2Y: €649
- Ceramic Coating 5Y: €1049
- Full price list: https://restorelab.io/es/pricing (EN: https://restorelab.io/en/pricing)

- [Clima Mediterráneo y la Pintura de tu Coche: Guía de Protección](https://restorelab.io/es/academy/mediterranean-climate-car-paint-protection) (EN: https://restorelab.io/en/academy/mediterranean-climate-car-paint-protection)
- [Tapicería de Cuero Dañada por el Sol: Restauración en Clima Mediterráneo](https://restorelab.io/es/academy/leather-seats-mediterranean-restoration) (EN: https://restorelab.io/en/academy/leather-seats-mediterranean-restoration)
- [Eliminación de Manchas de Agua en Cristales: ¿Pulir o Sustituir?](https://restorelab.io/es/academy/water-stain-removal-car-windows) (EN: https://restorelab.io/en/academy/water-stain-removal-car-windows)
- [Faros Amarillos vs Opacos: Causas, Vida Útil y Coste de Restauración](https://restorelab.io/es/academy/yellow-vs-cloudy-headlights-causes-lifespan) (EN: https://restorelab.io/en/academy/yellow-vs-cloudy-headlights-causes-lifespan)
- [Daño UV en Viseras de Moto y Acrílico de Embarcación](https://restorelab.io/es/academy/uv-damage-motorcycle-yacht-acrylic) (EN: https://restorelab.io/en/academy/uv-damage-motorcycle-yacht-acrylic)
